title: A Wedding Film
subtitle: The Day You Chose Each Other
description: Somewhere between the vows and the first dance, time stands still. This is that moment — held gently, forever.

title: Ragini
subtitle: She Was the Light in the Room
description: There are people who don't need a stage — the world simply arranges itself around them. Ragini is one of those people.

title: Aishwarya & Akshay
subtitle: Two Souls, One Beautiful Chaos
description: They laughed so hard they cried. They cried so softly it looked like joy. This is their story — exactly as it happened.
